calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shane Howarter, Esq. of Peretz & Associates, 415-732-3777, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
